SEARCH
Module org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject
Package org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database

Class Database

java.lang.Object
org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.Database
public class Database extends Object
Manages database connectivity and initialization using the Singleton pattern. This class is responsible for establishing a single shared database connection, creating required tables, and seeding initial data. Design Choice: The Singleton pattern ensures only one active database connection exists throughout the application lifecycle, improving resource control and consistency.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Faariz Sheikh
Date:
2026-03-17

  • Field Details

    • connection

      private final Connection connection
      Active SQL database connection used throughout the application. This connection is shared across all database operations.

    • instance

      private static Database instance
      Singleton instance of the Database class. Ensures only one database connection manager exists in the application.

  • Constructor Details

    • Database

      private Database(String user, String pass, String server, String dbName) throws SQLException, ClassNotFoundException
      Creates a new database connection and initializes required tables.
      Parameters:
      user - database username
      pass - database password
      server - database server address
      dbName - database name
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs
      ClassNotFoundException - if the JDBC driver is not found

  • Method Details

    • seedDevelopers

      private void seedDevelopers()
      Seeds the developers table with default entries if it is empty. This method runs only during initialization and prevents duplicate seeding by checking existing records.
      Implementation Note:
      Uses batch insertion for performance efficiency.

    • seedPlatforms

      private void seedPlatforms()
      Seeds the platforms table with default values if it is empty. This method ensures required platform data is available on first run.
      Implementation Note:
      Uses batch insertion for optimized performance.

    • createTable

      private void createTable(String tableName, String tableQuery)
      Creates a database table if it does not already exist. This method checks metadata before executing the creation query to avoid duplicate table creation.
      Parameters:
      tableName - name of the table to check or create
      tableQuery - SQL CREATE TABLE statement

    • getInstance

      public static void getInstance(String user, String pass, String server, String dbName)
      Initializes the Singleton database instance if it has not been created. If an instance already exists, it will be reused.
      Parameters:
      user - database username
      pass - database password
      server - database server
      dbName - database name
      Implementation Note:
      Acts as an initialization method for the Singleton pattern.

    • getInstance

      public static Database getInstance()
      Returns the existing database Singleton instance.
      Returns:
      active Database instance, or null if not initialized
      API Note:
      Should be called only after initialization via getInstance(user, pass, server, dbName)

    • getConnection

      public Connection getConnection()
      Returns the active database connection.
      Returns:
      SQL Connection instance used by the application
